                simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.permMapWalk, permMapWalk_loop]
            | tail hd' =>
                have := ih hd'
                simpa [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.permMapWalk, permMapWalk_loop] using this
      simpa [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edges, List.mem_map] using (List.mem_map_of_mem _ this)
    · simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.dartEdge, Sym2.map_mk]
  · rcases List.mem_toFinset.1 he with ⟨d, hd, rfl⟩
    have : ∃ d0 ∈ p.2.darts, (s d0.1, s d0.2) = d := by
      induction p.2 with
      | nil =>
          cases hd
      | @cons u v w h p ih =>
          cases hd with
          | head =>
              refine ⟨(u, v), by simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts], ?_⟩
              simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.permMapWalk, permMapWalk_cons, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts]
          | tail hd' =>
              rcases ih hd' with ⟨d0, hd0, rfl⟩
              refine ⟨d0, ?_, rfl⟩
              simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, hd0]
      | @loop u v p ih =>
          cases hd with
          | head =>
              refine ⟨(u, u), by simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts], ?_⟩
              simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.permMapWalk, permMapWalk_loop, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts]
          | tail hd' =>
              rcases ih hd' with ⟨d0, hd0, rfl⟩
              refine ⟨d0, ?_, rfl⟩
              simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, hd0]
    rcases this with ⟨d0, hd0, rfl⟩
    refine Finset.mem_image.2 ?_
    refine ⟨SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.dartEdge d0, ?_, ?_⟩
    · exact List.mem_toFinset.2 (List.mem_map_of_mem _ hd0)
    · simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.dartEdge, Sym2.map_mk]

classical
  obtain ⟨s, hs⟩ := heq
  subst hs
  suffices h :
      (edgeSet (permMapWalk n s p.2)).card = (Finset.image (fun e : Sym2 (Fin n) => e.map s) (edgeSet p.2)).card := by
    simpa [h]
  refine (Finset.card_congr (fun e he => e.map s) ?_ ?_ ?_ ?_) ?_
  · intro e he
    have : e ∈ (permMapWalk n s p.2).edges.toFinset := by
      simpa [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet]
    have : e ∈ (permMapWalk n s p.2).edges := by
      exact List.mem_toFinset.mp this
    have : ∃ d ∈ (permMapWalk n s p.2).darts, dartEdge d = e := by
      simpa [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edges] using List.mem_map.mp this
    rcases this with ⟨d, hd, rfl⟩
    have hd' : (s.symm d.1, s.symm d.2) ∈ p.2.darts := by
      -- use inverse map on darts
      have : permMapWalk n s.symm (permMapWalk n s p.2) = p.2 := by
        simpa [permMapWalk_comp, perm_symm_mul_self] using (permMapWalk_comp n (s := s) (t := s.symm) p.2)
      have : (s.symm d.1, s.symm d.2) ∈ (permMapWalk n s.symm (permMapWalk n s p.2)).darts := by
        -- compute darts map
        revert hd
        -- prove by induction that darts map pointwise
        intro hd
        have h_darts :
            ∀ {u v : Fin n} (w : (K n).LoopWalk u v),
              (permMapWalk n s.symm w).darts = (w.darts.map (fun d => (s.symm d.1, s.symm d.2))) := by
          intro u v w
          induction w with
          | nil =>
            simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts]
          | @cons u v w h p ih =>
            simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, ih]
          | @loop u v p ih =>
            simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, ih]
        -- use it on w := permMapWalk n s p.2
        have := congrArg (fun L => (s.symm d.1, s.symm d.2) ∈ L) (h_darts (w := permMapWalk n s p.2))
        -- membership in mapped list gives existence
        have hm : d ∈ (permMapWalk n s p.2).darts := hd
        -- show (s.symm d.1, s.symm d.2) in mapped list
        have : (s.symm d.1, s.symm d.2) ∈ (permMapWalk n s p.2).darts.map (fun d => (s.symm d.1, s.symm d.2)) := by
          exact List.mem_map_of_mem _ hm
        -- rewrite using equality of darts
        simpa [h_darts] using this
      simpa [this] using hd'
    -- now show mapped edge is in image
    have : dartEdge (s.symm d.1, s.symm d.2) ∈ p.2.edges := by
      refine List.mem_map_of_mem _ hd'
    have : dartEdge (s.symm d.1, s.symm d.2) ∈ p.2.edges.toFinset := by
      exact List.mem_toFinset.mpr this
    refine Finset.mem_image_of_mem (fun e : Sym2 (Fin n) => e.map s) ?_
    exact this
  · intro e₁ e₂ he₁ he₂ h
    exact Sym2.map_injective s.injective h
  · intro e he
    refine ⟨e.map s, ?_, rfl⟩
    exact Finset.mem_image_of_mem (fun e : Sym2 (Fin n) => e.map s) he
  · intro e he
    rcases Finset.mem_image.mp he with ⟨e', he', rfl⟩
    exact ⟨e', he', rfl⟩
  · intro e₁ he₁ e₂ he₂
    constructor <;> intro h
    · exact h
    · exact h

obtain ⟨s, hs⟩ := heq
  subst hs
  classical
  revert p
  refine Sigma.induction ?_
  intro u p
  have h_edges :
      (permMapWalk n s p).edges = p.edges.map (Sym2.map s) := by
    induction p with
    | nil =>
      simp [LoopWalk.edges]
    | @cons u v w h p ih =>
      simp [LoopWalk.edges, LoopWalk.darts, ih, LoopWalk.dartEdge, Sym2.map_mk]
    | @loop u v p ih =>
      simp [LoopWalk.edges, LoopWalk.darts, ih, LoopWalk.dartEdge, Sym2.map_mk]
  have h_finset :
      (edgeSet (permMapWalk n s p)) = (p.edgeSet).image (Sym2.map s) := by
    classical
    simp [LoopWalk.edgeSet, h_edges, List.toFinset_map]
  have hinj : Function.Injective (Sym2.map s : Sym2 (Fin n) → Sym2 (Fin n)) := by
    intro a b hab
    simpa using congrArg (Sym2.map s.symm) hab
  simpa [h_finset] using (Finset.card_image_of_injective _ hinj).symm

classical
  obtain ⟨s, rfl⟩ := heq
  simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edges, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts]

classical
  obtain ⟨s, hs⟩ := heq
  subst hs
  induction p with
  | mk u pw =>
    clear p
    induction pw with
    | nil =>
      simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edges, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts,
        permMapWalk, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.map]
    | @cons u v w h p ih =>
      simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edges, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts,
        permMapWalk, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.map, ih]
    | @loop u v p ih =>
      simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edges, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts,
        permMapWalk, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.map, ih]

classical
  obtain ⟨s, hs⟩ := heq
  subst hs
  have h_edges : (permMapWalk n s p.2).edges = p.2.edges.map (fun e => e.map s) := by
    induction p.2 with
    | nil =>
      simp [LoopWalk.edges]
    | @cons u v w h pw ih =>
      simp [LoopWalk.edges, ih, dartEdge, Sym2.map_id]
    | @loop u v pw ih =>
      simp [LoopWalk.edges, ih, dartEdge, Sym2.map_id]
  have h_edgeSet :
      (edgeSet (permMapWalk n s p.2))
        = (p.2.edges.map (fun e => e.map s)).toFinset := by
    simp [LoopWalk.edgeSet, h_edges]
  have h_finset_map :
      (p.2.edges.map (fun e => e.map s)).toFinset
        = p.2.edges.toFinset.image (fun e => e.map s) := by
    simpa [List.toFinset_map] using (rfl :
      (p.2.edges.map (fun e => e.map s)).toFinset =
        (p.2.edges.map (fun e => e.map s)).toFinset)
  have hs_inj : Function.Injective (fun e : Sym2 (Fin n) => e.map s) := by
    intro e₁ e₂ h
    simpa using congrArg (fun e : Sym2 (Fin n) => e.map s.symm) h
  simp [LoopWalk.edgeSet, h_edgeSet, h_finset_map, Finset.card_image_of_injective _ hs_inj]

classical
  obtain ⟨s, hs⟩ := heq
  subst hs
  suffices hset :
      (SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.permMapWalk n s p.2).edgeSet =
        (p.2.edgeSet).image (fun e : Sym2 (Fin n) => e.map s) := by
    simpa [hset, Finset.card_image_iff] using
      (Finset.card_image_of_injective (s := (p.2.edgeSet))
        (f := fun e : Sym2 (Fin n) => e.map s)
        (by
          intro e₁ e₂ h
          simpa using congrArg (fun e : Sym2 (Fin n) => e.map s.symm) h))
  induction p.2 with
  | nil =>
    simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edges, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts]
  | @cons u v w h pw ih =>
    simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edges, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts,
      SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.permMapWalk_cons, ih, Finset.image_union]
  | @loop u v pw ih =>
    simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edges, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts,
      SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.permMapWalk_loop, ih, Finset.image_union]

classical
  obtain ⟨s, hs⟩ := heq
  subst hs
  induction p.2 with
  | nil =>
    simp [LoopWalk.edgeSet, LoopWalk.edges, LoopWalk.darts]
  | @cons u v w h p ih =>
    simp [LoopWalk.edgeSet, LoopWalk.edges, LoopWalk.darts, ih]
  | @loop u v p ih =>
    simp [LoopWalk.edgeSet, LoopWalk.edges, LoopWalk.darts, ih]

classical
  obtain ⟨s, hs⟩ := heq
  subst hs
  have h_edges :
      (permMapWalk n s p.2).edges = List.map (fun e : Sym2 (Fin n) => e.map s) p.2.edges := by
    induction p.2 with
    | nil =>
      simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edges]
    | @cons u v w h pw ih =>
      simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edges, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, ih, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.dartEdge,
        Sym2.map_mk]
    | @loop u v pw ih =>
      simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edges, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, ih, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.dartEdge,
        Sym2.map_mk]
  have h_edgeSet :
      (permMapWalk n s p.2).edgeSet = (p.2.edgeSet).image (fun e : Sym2 (Fin n) => e.map s) := by
    unfold SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet
    simp [h_edges, List.toFinset_map, Finset.image_image]
  have hinj : Function.Injective (fun e : Sym2 (Fin n) => e.map s) := by
    intro a b hab
    simpa using congrArg (fun e : Sym2 (Fin n) => e.map s.symm) hab
  simpa [h_edgeSet] using (Finset.card_image_of_injective _ hinj).symm

classical
  obtain ⟨s, rfl⟩ := heq
  induction p.2 with
  | nil =>
      simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edges, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts]
  | @cons u v w h p ih =>
      simpa [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edges, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, ih]
  | @loop u v p ih =>
      simpa [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edges, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.darts, ih]

classical
  obtain ⟨s, hs⟩ := heq
  subst hs
  have h_edges : (permMapWalk n s p.2).edges = p.2.edges.map (fun e => e.map s) := by
    induction p.2 with
    | nil =>
      simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edges]
    | @cons u v w h pw ih =>
      simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edges, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.dartEdge, ih, List.map_map]
    | @loop u v pw ih =>
      simp [SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edges, SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.dartEdge, ih, List.map_map]
  have h_edgeSet :
      (edgeSet (permMapWalk n s p.2)) =
        (p.2.edgeSet).image (fun e => e.map s) := by
    unfold SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet
    simp [h_edges, List.toFinset_map, Finset.image_image]
  have hinj : Function.Injective (fun e : Sym2 (Fin n) => e.map s) := by
    intro e₁ e₂ h
    have : e₁.map s.symm = e₂.map s.symm := by
      simpa [Sym2.map_map] using congrArg (fun e => Sym2.map s.symm e) h
    simpa [Sym2.map_map] using this
  simpa [h_edgeSet] using (Finset.card_image_of_injective _ hinj).symm
